info.name: SAP Business One Service Layer API

description.content:
The SAP Business One Service Layer is an OData v4 (and legacy v3) REST
interface to a Business One company database. Clients authenticate via
POST /Login using company/user/password credentials and receive a
B1SESSION cookie, then operate on entities (BusinessPartners, Items,
Orders, Invoices, etc.) using standard OData verbs.


Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Business One
